title: VLAs with Long and Short-Term Memory
summary: Multi-scale embodied memory gives our models long-term and short-term memory, enabling complex tasks longer than ten minutes.
body: We introduce a multi-scale memory stack for embodied agents that keeps both persistent context and momentary state.
The architecture improves long-horizon sequencing and reduces catastrophic resets in multi-room tasks.
On real robots, memory-augmented policies complete longer instruction chains with fewer interventions.
